extractive_fidelity.detail: 8/8 claims in logic/claims.md judged faithful (load-bearing numbers AND asserted direction/polarity both match, no unsupported added clauses) against the actual full paper text (research/metrics/v3/fulltext/sal25.txt), per a frozen independent adversarial check (extractive_fidelity/sal25-trailblazer-alz-4-a-phase-3.yaml) run by a different pass than the compiler that wrote claims.md. Infidelity types found: none. source_bound, not validated: this measures fidelity TO THE PAPER, not the paper's scientific validity (compiler-model.md's independent-axes caveat) — no paper-ranker should be treated as sound on this axis alone.
